abstract.para: A dataset containing all occurrences available in GBIF matching the query: { "and" : [ "TaxonKey is Dalbergia cultrata T.S.Ralph", "HasCoordinate is true" ] } The dataset includes records from the following constituent datasets. The full metadata for each constituent is also included in this archive: 1 records from International Barcode of Life project (iBOL) 5 records from Harvard University Herbaria: All Records 24 records from 2023 Contributions of Plant Specimen Data inside China 28 records from Plant Specimen in Yunnan, China from Herbarium (PE),Institute of Botany, Chinese Academy of Sciences 1 records from World Plant Specimen from the Herbaria in China 38 records from Naturalis Biodiversity Center (NL) - Botany 3 records from Some Plant Specimens from KUN, IBSC, NAS Herbarium in China from 1900 to 1950 6 records from Natural History Museum (London) Collection Specimens 1 records from The AAU Herbarium Database 1 records from 2007-2022_nibr_simpl_vp 34 records from Digital Atlas of Trees and Wildlife in Thailand 1 records from 500,000 plant Specimens from PE Herbarium in China from 1950 to 1999
